name: 18.6oz Glass Bower Tall Tumbler Clear - Threshold™
description:
Keep your drinkware simple and classy with the 18.6-Ounce Glass Bower Tall Tumbler from Threshold™. This tall tumbler features a see-through design for an elegant look. Made of glass, this clear tumbler is suitable for cold beverages. Best of all, it is dishwasher safe for easy cleanup.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
